## 📋 Today's Overview
*July 17, 2026*

### Majorana (1 new today)

1. The study focuses on a Majorana-Kondo system with side-coupled Majorana zero modes, employing a spin-charge-entangled quantum impurity model with an Andreev⊗normal boundary condition to address the formation and evolution of the screening cloud.

### Qubit (8 new today)

1. **Post-Critical Meson Dynamics of Kibble-Zurek Excitations in a 5,564-Qubit Quantum Annealer**  
   The study focuses on a programmable Ising system with 5,564 superconducting qubits, employing coherent nonequilibrium dynamics in a quantum annealer to address the post-critical meson dynamics of Kibble-Zurek excitations.

2. **Simultaneous High-Fidelity Single-Qubit Gates in a Spin Qubit Array**  
   The study focuses on silicon spin qubits in a multi-qubit array, employing simultaneous control techniques to address the challenge of performing high-fidelity single-qubit gates in parallel for scalable quantum computing.

3. **Tensor Network decoding under inter-qubit correlated errors**  
   The study focuses on the 2D surface code, employing tensor network-based maximum likelihood decoding to address the unexplored performance under inter-qubit correlated error models.

4. **Tunable Nonlocal $ZZ$ Interaction for Remote Controlled-Z Gates Between Distributed Fixed-Frequency Qubits**  
   The study focuses on distributed fixed-frequency superconducting qubits in a modular architecture, employing synchronously coupled low-loss links to address the challenge of implementing entangling remote controlled-Z gates.

5. **Branch-resolved Pauli-block spectroscopy of residual conditional phase in two-qubit gates**  
   The study focuses on two-qubit gates for controlled-phase and CZ-style operations, employing branch-resolved Pauli-block spectroscopy to address the accurate calibration of residual conditional phase.

6. **Two-Tower Quantum Matrix Chain Multiplication: Trading Qubits for Depth**  
   The study focuses on matrix chain multiplication, employing a two-tower quantum algorithm to address the problem of reducing qubit count at the cost of increased circuit depth.

7. **SiMOS quantum-dot spin qubits enabled by extreme-ultraviolet lithography**  
   The study focuses on silicon quantum-dot spin qubits, employing extreme-ultraviolet lithography to address the need for nanometer-scale precision and uniformity compatible with advanced semiconductor manufacturing.

8. **Clifford-Only Quantum Reed-Solomon Codes and a Tornado Concatenation for Biased-Noise Cat Qubits**  
   The study focuses on dissipative cat qubits with biased noise, employing Clifford-only quantum Reed-Solomon codes and tornado concatenation to address the need for efficient error correction against a single dominant error type.

| 1 | **[Formation and Evolution of the Spin-Charge-Entangled Screening Cloud in the Majorana-Kondo System](https://arxiv.org/abs/2511.16446v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Side-coupled Majorana zero modes in Kondo systems realize a simple yet nontrivial hybridization setup that leads to distinct physics from the conventional Kondo effect. We have demonstrated in a previous work that the system can be described by a spin-charge-entangled (SCE) quantum impurity model with an Andreev$\otimes$normal boundary condition. Here we investigate in detail the formation process and microscopic mechanism of the SCE screening cloud using the numerical renormalization group method. We introduce temperature-dependent spatially integrated correlation functions that provide an unambiguous diagnostic of different components of the SCE screening cloud beyond the impurity entropy and local density of states. Our results reveal a crossover from a sequential two-stage screening of the spin and charge components to a simultaneous screening controlled by a single parameter. We also study the evolution of the low-energy fixed points in the presence of competing terms that break different symmetries and drive the system to different infrared fixed points. Our results suggest that the SCE screening effect in the Majorana-Kondo system makes itself a route to detecting Majorana zero modes.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>近藤体系中的侧耦合马约拉纳零模实现了一种简单但非平庸的杂化结构，从而产生与常规近藤效应截然不同的物理现象。我们先前的工作已证明，该体系可用具有安德烈夫⊗正常边界条件的自旋-电荷纠缠（SCE）量子杂质模型来描述。本文利用数值重整化群方法，详细研究了SCE屏蔽云的形成过程与微观机制。我们引入了与温度相关的空间积分关联函数，该函数能够超越杂质熵和局域态密度，为SCE屏蔽云的不同组分提供明确的诊断依据。研究结果揭示了从自旋与电荷分量的顺序两阶段屏蔽到由单一参数控制的同步屏蔽的交叉行为。我们还研究了在存在破坏不同对称性并驱动体系趋向不同红外不动点的竞争项时，低能不动点的演化过程。结果表明，马约拉纳-近藤体系中的SCE屏蔽效应为探测马约拉纳零模提供了一条可行路径。</p></details> | 2026-07-15 | Yun Chen et al. |
| 2 | **[Majorana string simulation of nonequilibrium dynamics in two-dimensional lattice fermion systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2511.02809v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>The study of real-time dynamics of fermions remains one of the last frontiers beyond the reach of classical simulations and is key to our understanding of quantum behavior in chemistry and materials, with implications for quantum technology. Here we introduce a Heisenberg-picture algorithm that propagates observables expressed in a Majorana-string basis using a truncation scheme that preserves Trotter accuracy and aims at maintaining computational efficiency. The framework is exact for quadratic Hamiltonians -- remaining restricted to a fixed low-weight sector determined by the physical observable -- admits variational initial states, and can be extended to interacting regimes via systematically controlled truncations. We benchmark our approach on one- and two-dimensional Fermi-Hubbard quenches, comparing against tensor network methods (MPS and fPEPS) and recent experimental data. The method achieves high accuracy on timescales comparable to state-of-the-art variational techniques and experiments, demonstrating that controlled Majorana-string truncation is a practical tool for simulating two-dimensional fermionic dynamics.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>费米子实时动力学的研究仍是经典模拟难以触及的最后前沿之一，对于理解化学与材料中的量子行为至关重要，并对量子技术具有深远意义。本文提出一种海森堡图像算法，该算法通过截断方案传播以马约拉纳弦基表示的观测量，在保持特罗特精度的同时力求维持计算效率。该框架对二次型哈密顿量具有精确性——始终局限于由物理观测量确定的固定低权重扇区——可容纳变分初始态，并能通过系统可控的截断扩展至相互作用区域。我们通过一维与二维费米-哈伯德淬火对方法进行基准测试，与张量网络方法（MPS与fPEPS）及近期实验数据展开对比。该方法在时间尺度上实现了与前沿变分技术及实验相当的高精度，证明可控马约拉纳弦截断是模拟二维费米子动力学的实用工具。</p></details> | 2026-07-14 | Matteo D'Anna et al. |
| 3 | **[Majorana parity qubit in coupled minimal Kitaev chains](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.09511v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Majorana zero modes provide a route to fault-tolerant qubits by encoding information non-locally in fermion parity. Their sensitivity to noise is expected to decrease exponentially with increasing separation between the Majoranas, a suppression known as topological protection. Kitaev chains engineered in quantum dot-superconductor arrays provide a tunable platform in which separated Majorana zero modes can emerge at the ends of the chain, even in two-site chains. These minimal-chain modes are known as poor man's Majoranas and retain characteristic Majorana properties, including near-zero energy and equal electron-hole character, but have only limited protection. A key outstanding challenge is to move beyond identifying such modes in electrical transport measurements and achieve coherent qubit control in the time domain. Here, we demonstrate a Majorana parity qubit by realizing coherent coupling between two-site Kitaev chains. Since total fermion parity is conserved, the system separates into global even and odd parity manifolds. We observe coherent parity oscillations in both manifolds with equal oscillation frequencies at the Majorana sweet spot, as predicted for isolated Majorana zero modes. We further show that the oscillation frequency and coherence depend systematically on inter-chain coupling and quantum-dot detunings, in close agreement with our model for short, partially protected chains. Our results establish the first coherent control of a Majorana qubit, encoded in the fermion parity of Majorana zero modes in minimal Kitaev chains.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>马约拉纳零模通过将信息非局域地编码在费米子奇偶性中，为容错量子比特提供了途径。其对噪声的敏感性预计随马约拉纳之间距离的增加而指数级下降，这种抑制称为拓扑保护。在量子点-超导体阵列中构建的Kitaev链提供了一个可调平台，其中分离的马约拉纳零模可在链端出现，即使在双位点链中也是如此。这些最小链模被称为穷人马约拉纳模，保留了马约拉纳模的特性，包括近零能量和等量的电子-空穴特征，但保护性有限。一个关键挑战是超越在电输运测量中识别此类模式，实现时域中的相干量子比特控制。在此，我们通过实现双位点Kitaev链之间的相干耦合，演示了马约拉纳奇偶性量子比特。由于总费米子奇偶性守恒，系统分为全局偶奇偶性和全局奇奇偶性流形。我们在两个流形中均观察到相干奇偶性振荡，且在马约拉纳甜点处振荡频率相等，正如孤立马约拉纳零模所预测的那样。我们进一步表明，振荡频率和相干性系统性地依赖于链间耦合和量子点失谐，与我们对短、部分保护链的模型高度一致。我们的结果建立了对马约拉纳量子比特的首次相干控制，该量子比特编码在最小Kitaev链中马约拉纳零模的费米子奇偶性中。</p></details> | 2026-07-10 | Francesco Zatelli et al. |
| 4 | **[Majorana physics in a Luttinger liquid with attractive interactions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.06751v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Majorana zero modes are the hallmark of topological superconductivity. In one-dimensional systems, these zero modes are usually introduced in the context of gapped, mean-field models that do not conserve particle number, such as the Kitaev chain. By non-locally encoding a conventional fermion across spatially separated Majorana zero modes, these systems become inherently immune to local decoherence. In this work, we show that signatures of Majorana edge physics persist in a number-conserving, gapless Luttinger liquid of spinless fermions with short-range attractive interactions. We identify the two-point correlator as a sharp diagnostic, revealing an edge-to-edge revival whose sign depends on the fermion-number parity. This revival is robust in the thermodynamic limit, and persists in the excited states of the system and at different fillings. A simple particle-hole ansatz for the ground state of the system with an odd number of fermions captures the physics of the system for a wide range of interaction strengths, interpolating between the free-fermion limit and the strongly interacting Majorana regime. Finally, we propose a concrete protocol to realize this model with ultracold dipolar molecules or atoms in an optical lattice, and to detect the revival via beam-splitter interferometry, opening an experimental route to Majorana physics beyond the conventional gapped-superconductor paradigm.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>马约拉纳零模是拓扑超导的标志性特征。在一维系统中，这些零模通常在不守恒粒子数的有能隙平均场模型（如基塔耶夫链）中被引入。通过将常规费米子非局域地编码在空间分离的马约拉纳零模上，这些系统天然具备抵抗局域退相干的能力。在本工作中，我们证明马约拉纳边缘物理的迹象可存在于具有短程吸引相互作用的无自旋费米子所构成的一种数守恒、无能隙的卢廷格液体中。我们指出两点关联函数可作为尖锐的诊断工具，揭示出一种边缘到边缘的复兴现象，其符号取决于费米子数宇称。这种复兴在热力学极限下具有鲁棒性，并在系统的激发态及不同填充下依然存在。针对具有奇数个费米子的系统基态，一种简单的粒子-空穴假设能在广泛的相互作用强度范围内捕捉系统物理，从而在自由费米子极限与强相互作用马约拉纳区间实现插值。最后，我们提出一个具体实验方案：利用光晶格中的超冷偶极分子或原子实现该模型，并通过分束器干涉测量法探测这种复兴现象，从而开辟一条超越传统有能隙超导范式的马约拉纳物理实验途径。</p></details> | 2026-07-07 | Francesco Debortoli et al. |
| 5 | **[Ramsey Interferometry in Wigner-Majorana Qudits](https://arxiv.org/abs/2509.06290v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Ramsey interferometry estimates a detuning from the phase accumulated between two interaction zones, with a resolution set by the interrogation time $τ$. We propose a single-qudit extension based on Wigner-Majorana (WM) spin-$j$ dynamics, whose internal levels form a multipath interferometer. The enhancement is not generic: ideal $\mathrm{QFT}_D$ and $\sqrt{X_D}$ sequences do not densify the central fringe under the population readouts considered. Instead, in manifolds that realize the WM coupling, it arises from coherences between separated ladder states created and recombined by a single near-resonant drive per Ramsey zone. For the qutrit, preparing the central state of a spin-1 WM manifold and measuring its return probability gives $P_3(Δ)=\cos^2(Δτ)$, versus the qubit $P_2(Δ)=\cos^2(Δτ/2)$. The central fringe is thus compressed twofold at fixed $τ$ and the maximal slope doubled in the ideal limit, with contrast ideally unity. For higher-dimensional WM manifolds (odd and even $D$) the central response sharpens with dimension, but the signal spreads over several channels; we introduce a scalar readout from nearest-neighbor shoulder populations and quantify the resolution-contrast trade-off via the slope $S_D$ and contrast $C_D$. We also study robustness to diagonal phase noise from probe-shift fluctuations: under projector-type common-mode dephasing, the WM readouts are less contrast-sensitive than the qubit readout. The robustness is symmetry-selective, not universal: for linear Zeeman dephasing ($L=J_z$), the large $m$-separation that compresses the fringe also enhances dephasing, so higher-dimensional readouts become more sensitive, not protected. The WM qutrit is thus a practical operating point for enhanced Ramsey spectroscopy at fixed $τ$; higher qudits trade extra slope for reduced contrast.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>拉姆齐干涉测量通过两个相互作用区域之间累积的相位来估计失谐量，其分辨率由探测时间τ决定。我们提出一种基于维格纳-马约拉纳（WM）自旋-j动力学的单qudit扩展方案，其内部能级构成一个多路径干涉仪。这种增强并非普遍存在：在所考虑布居数读出方式下，理想的QFT_D和√X_D序列并不会使中心条纹变密。相反，在实现WM耦合的流形中，这种增强源于每个拉姆齐区域内单个近共振驱动所产生和复合的分离阶梯态之间的相干性。对于qutrit，制备自旋-1 WM流形的中心态并测量其返回概率可得P₃(Δ)=cos²(Δτ)，而qubit的对应结果为P₂(Δ)=cos²(Δτ/2)。因此，在固定τ下中心条纹被压缩两倍，理想极限下最大斜率加倍，对比度理想值为1。对于更高维WM流形（奇数和偶数D），中心响应随维度增加而锐化，但信号会分散到多个通道；我们引入基于最近邻肩部布居数的标量读出，并通过斜率S_D和对比度C_D来量化分辨率-对比度权衡。我们还研究了探测偏移涨落引起的对角相位噪声的鲁棒性：在投影型共模退相干下，WM读出的对比度敏感性低于qubit读出。这种鲁棒性具有对称选择性而非普适性：对于线性塞曼退相干（L=J_z），压缩条纹所需的大m分离同时增强了退相干效应，因此高维读出变得更敏感而非受保护。因此，WM qutrit是在固定τ下增强拉姆齐光谱学的实用工作点；更高维qudit则以降低对比度为代价换取更大的斜率。</p></details> | 2026-07-07 | Branislav Ilikj et al. |
| 6 | **[Topological properties and Majorana Multiplicity in Zigzag Kitaev Chain](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.04399v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>We investigate the spectral and topological properties of a zigzag Kitaev chain constructed from two diagonally coupled one dimensional Kitaev chains with a zero and finite superconducting pairing phase difference. Using a Bogoliubov-de Gennes formulation, we analyze the energy spectrum, distribution of Majorana zero modes (MZMs), the quasi-particle dispersion, and the winding number, respectively. For a zero phase difference, the resulting energy spectrum shows topological phases with two, four MZMs, and trivial regions. The phases of gap closure determine the topological phase boundaries. In particular, for the phase difference between $φ=π$, the degeneracy of MZMs is partially lifted, leading to modified topological phases compared to the case $φ=0$. The topological and trivial phase boundaries are further confirmed by evaluating the quasi-particle dispersion and the topological invariant, namely the winding number. We show that the zigzag Kitaev chain contributes independently to the total winding number $ν= 1$ and $2$, giving rise to distinct topological phases that support two and four MZMs. The $ν= 0$ gives rise to a trivial region. The energy spectrum of systems corroborates the analytical phase boundaries and reveals characteristics associated with hybridization, enabling us to obtain the complete phase diagram of the zigzag model. Our results establish the zigzag Kitaev chain as a minimal platform for engineering MZM quantum computations, with potential applications in the study of topological phases and Majorana based qubit physics.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>我们研究了由两条对角耦合的一维Kitaev链（具有零和有限超导配对相位差）构建的锯齿形Kitaev链的谱学与拓扑性质。利用Bogoliubov-de Gennes形式，我们分别分析了其能谱、马约拉纳零模（MZMs）分布、准粒子色散以及缠绕数。对于零相位差，所得能谱呈现具有两个、四个MZMs的拓扑相以及平庸区域。能隙闭合相位决定了拓扑相边界。特别地，当相位差为φ=π时，MZMs的简并度被部分解除，导致与φ=0情形相比拓扑相发生改变。通过评估准粒子色散和拓扑不变量（即缠绕数），进一步确认了拓扑相与平庸相边界。我们证明锯齿形Kitaev链对总缠绕数ν=1和ν=2的贡献相互独立，从而产生支持两个和四个MZMs的不同拓扑相，而ν=0则对应平庸区域。系统的能谱验证了解析相边界，并揭示了与杂化相关的特征，使我们能够获得锯齿形模型的完整相图。我们的结果确立了锯齿形Kitaev链作为工程化MZM量子计算的最小平台，在拓扑相及基于马约拉纳的量子比特物理研究中具有潜在应用价值。</p></details> | 2026-07-05 | Rajiv Kumar et al. |
| 7 | **[Quasi-two-dimensional Majorana zero modes from finite-size-coupled chiral hinge states](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.04358v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Majorana zero modes (MZMs) in topological superconductors have attracted broad research interest for their potential applications in topological quantum computation. In this work, we propose a quasi-two-dimensional route to realize spatially separated MZMs in a chiral higher-order topological insulator (HOTI) proximitized by a conventional $s$-wave superconductor through a theoretical model study. In three dimensions, the chiral HOTI hosts gapless hinge states along the $z$ direction, arising from a mass term that anisotropically gaps the surface Dirac cones of a topological insulator. By confining the sample along the $x$ direction while keeping it extended along $y$ and finite along $z$, opposite $z$-directed chiral hinge states hybridize and effectively form one-dimensional helical channels. Incorporating the superconducting proximity effect into this quasi-two-dimensional system induces effective $p$-wave pairing in these helical channels, thereby opening a topological gap. A fully open-boundary sample then hosts four localized MZMs, one at each endpoint of the helical channels, realizing a second-order topological superconductor characterized by Majorana corner modes. In addition to MZMs, we also find that superconducting pairing in this model produces extended Majorana hinge modes in three dimensions. Furthermore, representative disorder calculations indicate that these Majorana corner modes are robust against weak-to-moderate disorder, provided the excitation gap remains open. These results establish finite-size-coupled chiral hinge states as a promising platform for engineering multiple MZMs via conventional superconducting proximity effect.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>拓扑超导体中的马约拉纳零模（MZMs）因其在拓扑量子计算中的潜在应用而引起了广泛研究兴趣。在本工作中，我们通过理论模型研究，提出了一种准二维途径，在由常规s波超导体通过近邻效应耦合的手性高阶拓扑绝缘体（HOTI）中实现空间分离的MZMs。在三维空间中，手性HOTI沿z方向具有无能隙的铰链态，这些铰链态源于各向异性地打开拓扑绝缘体表面狄拉克锥的质量项。通过沿x方向限制样品，同时保持其沿y方向延展且沿z方向有限，相反z方向的手性铰链态发生杂化，有效形成一维螺旋通道。将超导近邻效应引入该准二维系统，可在这些螺旋通道中诱导有效p波配对，从而打开拓扑能隙。完全开放边界的样品将承载四个局域MZMs，分别位于螺旋通道的每个端点，实现了以马约拉纳角模为特征的第二类拓扑超导体。除MZMs外，我们还发现该模型中的超导配对在三维空间中产生扩展的马约拉纳铰链模。此外，代表性无序计算表明，只要激发能隙保持开放，这些马约拉纳角模对弱至中等强度的无序具有鲁棒性。这些结果确立了有限尺寸耦合的手性铰链态作为通过常规超导近邻效应工程化多个MZMs的有前景平台。</p></details> | 2026-07-05 | Wenhao Liang et al. |
| 8 | **[Ferroelectricity in a magnon Bose-Einstein condensate: Nonreciprocal superfluidity, exceptional points, and Majorana bosons](https://arxiv.org/abs/2512.22073v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>We investigate a ferroelectric instability of a magnon Bose-Einstein condensate, mediated by its interaction with an electric field through a geometric Aharonov-Casher (AC) phase. A distinct feature of the system is the positive feedback loop in which an electric field induces magnon orbital motion via the AC phase, generating electric polarization that in turn enhances the original field. Based on bosonic Bogoliubov-de Gennes (BdG) mean-field theory, we show that this feedback drives a spontaneous ferroelectric transition in the magnon superfluid, accompanied by a persistent magnon supercurrent. In the resulting ferroelectric phase, the quasiparticle excitation spectrum becomes nonreciprocal, reflecting spontaneous breaking of spatial inversion symmetry. At the critical point of the transition, the bosonic BdG Hamiltonian exhibits a global coalescence of both eigenvalues and eigenvectors, forming exceptional points throughout the entire Brillouin zone. The corresponding eigenvector is an equally weighted superposition of bosonic quasiparticle and quasihole states and is invariant under particle-hole transformation, allowing it to be interpreted as a bosonic analog of a Majorana fermion.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>我们研究了磁振子玻色-爱因斯坦凝聚体中的铁电不稳定性，该不稳定性通过几何阿哈罗诺夫-卡舍尔（AC）相位介导其与电场的相互作用。该体系的一个显著特征是正反馈回路：电场通过AC相位诱导磁振子轨道运动，产生电极化，进而增强原始电场。基于玻色子博戈留波夫-德热纳（BdG）平均场理论，我们证明该反馈驱动磁振子超流体中发生自发铁电相变，并伴随持久的磁振子超流。在由此产生的铁电相中，准粒子激发谱变为非互易的，反映了空间反演对称性的自发破缺。在相变临界点，玻色子BdG哈密顿量展现出本征值和本征矢的全局合并，在整个布里渊区形成例外点。相应的本征矢是玻色子准粒子和准空穴态的等权重叠加，且在粒子-空穴变换下保持不变，因此可被解释为马约拉纳费米子的玻色子类比。</p></details> | 2026-07-02 | Kazuki Yamamoto et al. |
| 9 | **[Floquet Majorana flat bands and emergent Cooper pair symmetries in $p-$wave magnet$-$superconductor heterostructure](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.31550v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>We investigate the emergence of topological superconductivity at the two-dimensional heterostructure interface between a $p$-wave magnet (pWM) and an $s$-wave superconductor. By analyzing nodal gap closings, we identify seven distinct nodal topological phases, each characterized by the presence of Majorana zero-energy flat bands and quantized zero-bias conductance peaks. We demonstrate that the effective $p$-wave nature of the system gives rise to spin-triplet pairing correlations with even-frequency, odd-parity and odd-frequency, even-parity symmetries. Notably, the introduction of inter-orbital hopping induces an exotic orbital-singlet term characterized by simultaneous odd-parity and odd-frequency. Furthermore, we explore the transition from static phases to Floquet topological regimes through periodic driving. These driven phases host both zero and $π$ Majorana flat bands, with transport signatures governed by the Floquet sum rule. Most significantly, we show that periodic driving fundamentally reshapes the topological and superconducting landscape by generating multiple nodal points that support higher winding numbers and multiple Majorana flat bands, while the emergent Floquet degree of freedom doubles the number of symmetry-allowed Cooper-pair correlations. The first class of correlations is hosted by the even-Floquet sectors and has a direct counterpart in the static limit. In contrast, the second is a distinct Floquet-generated class that confines to the odd-Floquet sectors, representing a fundamentally nonequilibrium pairing channel that cannot exist in static systems. Finally, we demonstrate the robustness of these topological modes against strong disorder, confirming their potential for stable fault-tolerant applications.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>我们研究了p波磁体与s波超导体二维异质结界面处拓扑超导电性的涌现。通过分析节点能隙闭合，我们识别出七种不同的节点拓扑相，每种相都以马约拉纳零能平带和量化零偏压电导峰为特征。我们证明体系的有效p波特性产生了具有偶频奇宇称和奇频偶宇称对称性的自旋三重态配对关联。值得注意的是，引入轨道间跳跃会诱导出同时具有奇宇称和奇频率的奇特轨道单态项。此外，我们通过周期性驱动探索了从静态相到弗洛凯拓扑区域的转变。这些驱动相同时拥有零模和π模马约拉纳平带，其输运特征由弗洛凯求和规则支配。最重要的是，我们证明周期性驱动通过产生支持更高绕数和多个马约拉纳平带的多个节点，从根本上重塑了拓扑和超导景观，同时涌现的弗洛凯自由度使对称性允许的库珀对关联数量加倍。第一类关联存在于偶弗洛凯扇区，在静态极限中有直接对应。相比之下，第二类是独特的弗洛凯生成类，局限于奇弗洛凯扇区，代表一种在静态系统中不可能存在的基本非平衡配对通道。最后，我们证明了这些拓扑模式对强无序的鲁棒性，确认了它们在稳定容错应用中的潜力。</p></details> | 2026-06-30 | Subhendu Kumar Patra et al. |

### Qubit

| **#** | **Title** | **Abstract** | **Date** | **Authors** |

| 1 | **[Post-Critical Meson Dynamics of Kibble-Zurek Excitations in a 5,564-Qubit Quantum Annealer](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.13842v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Quantum phase transitions provide a controlled route for generating many-body excitations, but the dynamics after the critical point can be as important as the initial defect creation. Recent progress in quantum annealing has made it possible to access coherent nonequilibrium dynamics in programmable Ising systems with thousands of superconducting qubits. Here we use this capability to study a longitudinally biased quantum Ising chain, where Kibble--Zurek defect creation is followed by nonintegrable post-critical dynamics. The longitudinal bias confines kink--antikink excitations into mesonic bound states, so that the final spin configurations encode both the production of defects near the critical point and the subsequent evolution of the confined excitations. Using energy-scale rescaling and zero-noise extrapolation, we find that the defect density follows the expected biased Kibble--Zurek/Landau--Zener crossover and agrees with matrix-product-state simulations with uniform bias. In contrast, magnetization, spatial profiles, and minority-domain statistics reveal that mesonic evolution is interrupted by localization of the post-critical domain pattern. Matrix-product-state simulations with disorder reproduce this separation between robust defect creation and localized post-critical dynamics. Our results show that large-scale quantum annealers can probe the fate of critical excitations beyond defect counting.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>量子相变为产生多体激发提供了一条可控路径，但临界点之后的动力学与初始缺陷的产生同样重要。量子退火的最新进展使得在包含数千个超导量子比特的可编程伊辛系统中研究相干非平衡动力学成为可能。本文利用这一能力研究了一个纵向偏置的量子伊辛链，其中基布尔-祖雷克缺陷产生之后伴随的是不可积的后临界动力学。纵向偏置将扭结-反扭结激发束缚成介子束缚态，因此最终的自旋构型既编码了临界点附近缺陷的产生，也编码了随后受限激发的演化。通过能量尺度重缩放和零噪声外推，我们发现缺陷密度遵循预期的偏置基布尔-祖雷克/朗道-齐纳交叉行为，并与均匀偏置下的矩阵乘积态模拟结果一致。相比之下，磁化强度、空间轮廓和少数域统计量表明，介子演化因后临界域模式的局域化而中断。包含无序的矩阵乘积态模拟再现了稳健缺陷产生与局域化后临界动力学之间的这种分离。我们的结果表明，大规模量子退火器能够探索临界激发的命运，而不仅仅是计数缺陷。</p></details> | 2026-07-15 | Francis A. Bayocboc et al. |
| 2 | **[Simultaneous High-Fidelity Single-Qubit Gates in a Spin Qubit Array](https://arxiv.org/abs/2507.11918v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Silicon spin qubits offer a promising path to scalable quantum computing due to their compatibility with industrial semiconductor manufacturing and recent advances in multi-qubit integration. A key requirement for scaling quantum processors is the ability to perform high-fidelity operations in parallel across many qubits. In silicon spin systems, however, simultaneous control remains a major challenge, as fidelities typically degrade under parallel operation. In a five-qubit silicon spin array, we identify microwave-drive-induced AC Stark shifts as the dominant source of this degradation. We address this by introducing a scalable mitigation protocol based solely on pairwise phase calibrations. Using tailored control pulses on a shared control line, we achieve primitive $π/2$ gate fidelities well above 99.99% for each qubit individually, with some approaching 99.999%, surpassing previously reported fidelities in silicon spin qubits. Crucially, these fidelities are preserved above 99.99% during simultaneous operation of up to three qubits. During parallel five-qubit operation, fidelities remain at the practical fault-tolerant threshold of 99.9%, with the loss attributed to drive-induced decoherence resulting from increased microwave power. This effect can be mitigated through device-level improvements. By demonstrating that high-fidelity control is maintained during simultaneous operation, we overcome a central challenge in silicon spin qubits and highlight the potential of shared qubit-control lines for scaling.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>硅自旋量子比特因其与工业半导体制造的兼容性以及多量子比特集成的最新进展，为可扩展量子计算提供了一条有前途的路径。扩展量子处理器的关键要求之一是能够并行地对许多量子比特执行高保真度操作。然而，在硅自旋系统中，同时控制仍然是一个主要挑战，因为在并行操作下保真度通常会下降。在一个五量子比特硅自旋阵列中，我们识别出微波驱动引起的交流斯塔克位移是这种退化的主要来源。我们通过引入一种仅基于成对相位校准的可扩展缓解协议来解决这个问题。通过在共享控制线上使用定制控制脉冲，我们为每个单独量子比特实现了远高于99.99%的基本π/2门保真度，其中一些接近99.999%，超过了先前报道的硅自旋量子比特保真度。至关重要的是，在最多三个量子比特同时操作期间，这些保真度保持在99.99%以上。在五量子比特并行操作期间，保真度仍保持在实用的容错阈值99.9%，其损失归因于微波功率增加导致的驱动诱导退相干。这种效应可以通过器件层面的改进来缓解。通过证明高保真度控制在同时操作期间得以维持，我们克服了硅自旋量子比特的一个核心挑战，并突显了共享量子比特控制线在扩展方面的潜力。</p></details> | 2026-07-15 | Yi-Hsien Wu et al. |
| 3 | **[Tensor Network decoding under inter-qubit correlated errors](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.13570v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>The maximum likelihood decoder based on tensor networks has proven highly successful for the 2D surface code, achieving the optimal decoding success rate. However, existing tensor network decoders are typically designed for independent single-qubit error models, and their performance under inter-qubit correlated error models remains unexplored. This is due to two major challenges. The first challenge lies in constructing the tensor network for correlated errors, since the same final Pauli error can arise from many different combinations of independent and correlated errors, preventing a direct factorization of the error probability. The second challenge is that even after a tensor network is constructed, it generally contains huge-dimensional tensors and is therefore not efficiently contractible. In this work, to address the first difficulty, we introduce additional binary indices and two transformations to construct a multi-index tensor network for maximum-likelihood decoding with correlated errors. To address the second difficulty, we use reparametrization, elimination, and index classification to decompose the huge-dimensional tensors into lower-dimensional tensors. This yields an efficiently contractible tensor network for error models satisfying the tractability conditions derived in this work. We perform numerical simulations for a representative correlated error model and show that the maximum-likelihood decoder implemented with our multi-index tensor network construction achieves a higher finite-size threshold than the widely used MWPM decoder.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>基于张量网络的最大似然解码器已被证明在二维表面码上非常成功，实现了最优解码成功率。然而，现有的张量网络解码器通常是为独立的单量子比特错误模型设计的，它们在量子比特间相关错误模型下的性能仍未得到探索。这源于两个主要挑战。第一个挑战在于为相关错误构建张量网络，因为相同的最终泡利错误可能由许多不同的独立错误和相关错误组合产生，阻碍了错误概率的直接分解。第二个挑战是，即使构建了张量网络，它通常也包含巨大维度的张量，因此无法有效收缩。在这项工作中，为解决第一个困难，我们引入了额外的二进制索引和两种变换，为具有相关错误的最大似然解码构建了一个多索引张量网络。为解决第二个困难，我们使用重参数化、消元和索引分类将巨大维度的张量分解为低维张量。这为满足本工作中推导的可处理性条件的错误模型，产生了一个可有效收缩的张量网络。我们对一个代表性的相关错误模型进行了数值模拟，结果表明，使用我们的多索引张量网络构建实现的最大似然解码器，其有限尺寸阈值高于广泛使用的MWPM解码器。</p></details> | 2026-07-15 | Yue Yan et al. |
| 4 | **[Tunable Nonlocal $ZZ$ Interaction for Remote Controlled-Z Gates Between Distributed Fixed-Frequency Qubits](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.28526v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Scaling superconducting quantum processors toward fault-tolerant operation will likely require architectures that extend beyond monolithic chips. Modular processors connected by low-loss superconducting links provide a promising route, but implementing entangling gates between remote fixed-frequency qubits remains challenging. Here we propose a distributed architecture in which two synchronously controlled double-transmon couplers mediate the interaction between fixed-frequency transmons in separate packages connected by a 25-cm coaxial cable. The scheme activates a tunable nonlocal $ZZ$ interaction on demand while suppressing residual static coupling, allowing the superconducting link to function as a gate-native interconnect rather than solely as a state-transfer channel. Circuit-level simulations show an on/off ratio exceeding $10^6$ and a remote controlled-Z gate with a projected coherent fidelity of $99.99\%$ under experimentally relevant parameters. Open-system simulations further indicate that, within the representative Markovian noise model considered here, endpoint-qubit decoherence is the largest contribution to gate infidelity, while photon loss in the retained cable modes remains smaller but non-negligible. These results identify DTC-mediated tunable nonlocal coupling as a promising gate primitive for modular superconducting processors based on fixed-frequency qubits.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>将超导量子处理器扩展到容错操作，可能需要超越单片芯片的架构。由低损耗超导连接线连接的模块化处理器提供了一条有前途的路径，但在远程固定频率量子比特之间实现纠缠门仍然具有挑战性。本文提出了一种分布式架构，其中两个同步控制的双transmon耦合器介导了通过25厘米同轴电缆连接的不同封装中固定频率transmon之间的相互作用。该方案按需激活可调的非局域ZZ相互作用，同时抑制残余静态耦合，使得超导连接线能够充当门原生互连，而不仅仅是状态传输通道。电路级模拟显示，开关比超过10^6，并且在实验相关参数下，远程受控Z门的预计相干保真度为99.99%。开放系统模拟进一步表明，在所考虑的典型马尔可夫噪声模型中，端点量子比特退相干是门保真度损失的最大贡献因素，而保留电缆模式中的光子损失虽较小但不可忽略。这些结果表明，基于双transmon耦合器（DTC）的可调非局域耦合，是构建基于固定频率量子比特的模块化超导处理器的一种有前途的门原语。</p></details> | 2026-07-15 | Benzheng Yuan et al. |
| 5 | **[Branch-resolved Pauli-block spectroscopy of residual conditional phase in two-qubit gates](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.10249v3)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Recent progress in quantum physics and quantum technologies is driving quantum computing from the noisy intermediate-scale (NISQ) era toward fault-tolerant operation. High-precision control of two-qubit gates is among the most critical requirements in this transition and hinges on accurate two-qubit calibration. For controlled-phase and CZ-style operations, the residual conditional phase (the nonlocal ZZ-type deviation after local compensation) is weakly resolved at leading order in average infidelity and randomized benchmarking, and repeated Ramsey amplification does not reliably isolate it from ordinary target detuning, SPAM errors, and contrast loss in long sequences. We introduce branch-resolved Pauli-block spectroscopy to estimate the per-cycle residual ZZ-rotation angle theta_c with its sign, from which the controlled-phase residual follows by a fixed convention. The protocol repeats a fixed probe for N cycles, measures the closed Pauli block IX, IY, ZX, and ZY, and forms branch coherences C+ and C- conditioned on the control qubit; theta_c splits the two branch phase slopes in opposite directions, while local target phase beta_c shifts them together. An echoed-cycle variant suppresses removable local terms while preserving the nonlocal contribution. Numerical simulations with injected theta_c, detuning, damping, and SPAM confirm unbiased signed readout where scalar-sector alternatives fail and distinguish opposite-sign errors at equal infidelity. On one superconducting cloud qubit-coupler pair, a pulse-level calibration closed loop shows near-linear injection, preserved branch contrast, and tracking of the native residual conditional phase through one iteration. The approach yields a low-overhead, signed per-cycle estimate of residual conditional phase that standard fidelity benchmarks underresolve at leading order.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>量子物理学和量子技术的最新进展正推动量子计算从含噪声中等规模量子（NISQ）时代迈向容错操作。双量子比特门的高精度控制是这一转变中最关键的要求之一，并依赖于精确的双量子比特校准。对于受控相位门和CZ类操作，残余条件相位（局域补偿后的非局域ZZ型偏差）在平均不保真度和随机基准测试的领头阶中分辨能力较弱，且重复的拉姆齐放大无法可靠地将其与普通目标失谐、态制备与测量（SPAM）误差以及长序列中的对比度损失区分开来。我们引入了分支分辨泡利阻塞光谱学，用于估计每周期残余ZZ旋转角θ_c及其符号，受控相位残余量可通过固定约定由此得出。该协议对固定探针重复N个周期，测量封闭泡利块IX、IY、ZX和ZY，并形成以控制量子比特为条件的分支相干性C+和C-；θ_c使两个分支相位斜率朝相反方向分裂，而局域目标相位β_c则使它们一起移动。一种回波周期变体在保留非局域贡献的同时抑制了可移除的局域项。注入θ_c、失谐、阻尼和SPAM的数值模拟证实了无偏有符号读出（标量扇区替代方案失败之处），并能在等不保真度下区分相反符号的错误。在一对超导云量子比特-耦合器上，脉冲级校准闭环显示出近线性注入、保留的分支对比度，以及通过一次迭代追踪原生残余条件相位的能力。该方法提供了一种低开销、每周期有符号的残余条件相位估计，而标准保真度基准测试在领头阶下无法充分分辨该相位。</p></details> | 2026-07-15 | Xudan Chai et al. |
| 6 | **[Two-Tower Quantum Matrix Chain Multiplication: Trading Qubits for Depth](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.13191v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Matrix chain multiplication -- computing $\mathcal{W} = M^{(0)}\cdots M^{(K-1)}$ where $M^{(k)} \in \mathbb{R}^{P_k \times P_{k+1}}$ -- arises in scientific computing, machine learning, and graph analysis. Despite the importance of this problem, for chains of distinct matrices, the classical number of operations grows linearly with the chain length $K$ and polynomially in the matrix dimensions. We present \emph{Two-Tower Matrix Multiplication}, a quantum subroutine that encodes the product $\mathcal{W}$ of the $K$ matrices into a quantum state in circuit depth $\mathcal{O}(\max_{k} \mathrm{polylog} (P_k P_{k+1}))$, which is independent of~$K$ within the QRAM-based state-preparation model, whereas the qubit count is $\mathcal{O}\bigl(\sum_{k} \log P_k \bigr)$; the total gate count remains linear in $K$, so the gain is in the circuit depth. The construction interleaves state-preparation operators across two layers; within each layer, all operators act on disjoint registers and execute in parallel. This subroutine can be specialized for the chain-vector case, which computes the product of $K-1$ matrices applied to a vector. We prove the correctness of the subroutine for all $K$ and provide two implementations using the Qiskit and QCLAB frameworks. The subroutine is applicable to any downstream quantum algorithm that operates on a matrix encoded in the statevector, including norm estimation, graph-matrix powers, linear system solving, and quantum machine learning kernels.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>矩阵链乘法——计算 $\mathcal{W} = M^{(0)}\cdots M^{(K-1)}$，其中 $M^{(k)} \in \mathbb{R}^{P_k \times P_{k+1}}$——出现在科学计算、机器学习和图分析中。尽管该问题很重要，但对于不同矩阵的链，经典操作次数随链长 $K$ 线性增长，并随矩阵维度多项式增长。我们提出*双塔矩阵乘法*，这是一种量子子程序，它将 $K$ 个矩阵的乘积 $\mathcal{W}$ 编码到量子态中，电路深度为 $\mathcal{O}(\max_{k} \mathrm{polylog} (P_k P_{k+1}))$，在基于QRAM的状态制备模型中该深度与 $K$ 无关，而量子比特数为 $\mathcal{O}\bigl(\sum_{k} \log P_k \bigr)$；总门数仍与 $K$ 成线性关系，因此增益体现在电路深度上。该构造将状态制备算符交错分布在两层中；在每一层内，所有算符作用于不相交的寄存器并并行执行。该子程序可专门用于链-向量情形，即计算 $K-1$ 个矩阵作用于一个向量的乘积。我们证明了该子程序对所有 $K$ 的正确性，并提供了使用Qiskit和QCLAB框架的两种实现。该子程序适用于任何对编码在态矢量中的矩阵进行运算的下游量子算法，包括范数估计、图矩阵幂、线性系统求解和量子机器学习核。</p></details> | 2026-07-14 | Giacomo Antonioli et al. |
| 7 | **[SiMOS quantum-dot spin qubits enabled by extreme-ultraviolet lithography](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.13121v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>The realization of large-scale silicon quantum processors requires spin qubits compatible with advanced semiconductor manufacturing technologies, demanding lithographic processes that combine nanometer-scale precision with exceptional uniformity. Although the highest-performing silicon spin qubits demonstrated to date have relied on electron-beam (e-beam) lithography, its serial exposure process limits reproducibility studies and wafer-scale fabrication. Here, we demonstrate high-performance silicon metal-oxide-semiconductor (SiMOS) spin qubits fabricated using extreme-ultraviolet (EUV) lithography in a 300 mm semiconductor pilot line. We report wafer-scale quantum-dot uniformity metrics, including 100 % room-temperature gate-to-gate leakage yield and sub-nanometer control of critical gate dimensions. We characterize four double-dot systems realized in two triple-quantum-dot devices. Gate set tomography (GST) reveals consistently high fidelities across all four systems, with values up to 99.8 % for SPAM, 99.9 % for single-qubit gates, and 99.1 % for two-qubit gates. The devices exhibit highly reproducible exchange turn-on characteristics of 10-13 dec/V, indicating high fabrication uniformity enabled by EUV patterning. These results establish EUV lithography as a viable manufacturing technology for quantum processors based on high-fidelity SiMOS spin qubits.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>大规模硅量子处理器的实现需要与先进半导体制造技术兼容的自旋量子比特，这就要求光刻工艺兼具纳米级精度和卓越的均匀性。尽管迄今为止性能最高的硅自旋量子比特依赖于电子束光刻，但其串行曝光过程限制了可重复性研究和晶圆级制造。在此，我们展示了使用极紫外光刻技术在300毫米半导体中试线上制造的高性能硅金属氧化物半导体自旋量子比特。我们报告了晶圆级量子点均匀性指标，包括100%的室温栅极间漏电流良率和关键栅极尺寸的亚纳米级控制。我们表征了在两个三量子点器件中实现的四个双量子点系统。栅极层析成像显示，所有四个系统的一致高保真度，其中SPAM保真度高达99.8%，单量子比特门保真度高达99.9%，双量子比特门保真度高达99.1%。这些器件表现出高度可重复的交换开启特性，斜率为10-13 dec/V，表明EUV图案化实现了高制造均匀性。这些结果确立了EUV光刻作为基于高保真度SiMOS自旋量子比特的量子处理器的可行制造技术。</p></details> | 2026-07-14 | Thomas Van Caekenberghe et al. |
| 8 | **[Variational simulation of higher-spin systems on qubit-based quantum simulators](https://arxiv.org/abs/2405.05051v3)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Qubit-based quantum simulators naturally target two-level systems, whereas many quantum many-body problems are intrinsically $d$-level. Encodings from qudits to qubits then enlarge the Hilbert space and can introduce unphysical states that interfere with variational optimization. We formulate a variational framework for encoded $d$-level models that suppresses these illegitimate states with penalty terms and benchmark it for spin-1 and spin-3/2 bilinear-biquadratic Heisenberg chains. We compare binary encoding, which minimizes the qubit overhead, with symmetry encoding, which preserves the relevant spin symmetries and enables symmetry-conserving ansatzes. Although binary encoding is more qubit efficient, its hardware-efficient ansatz is harder to train and less effective at exploiting conserved quantities. By contrast, symmetry encoding requires more qubits but reaches substantially higher fidelities, converges faster, and exhibits better trainability than the binary hardware-efficient ansatz. These results identify symmetry-preserving encodings as a practical route to simulating higher-spin models on existing qubit platforms.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>基于量子比特的量子模拟器天然针对两能级系统，而许多量子多体问题本质上是d能级的。从qudit到qubit的编码会扩大希尔伯特空间，并可能引入干扰变分优化的非物理态。我们为编码的d能级模型构建了一个变分框架，通过惩罚项抑制这些非法态，并针对自旋1和自旋3/2双线性-双二次海森堡链进行了基准测试。我们比较了最小化量子比特开销的二进制编码与保留相关自旋对称性并支持对称性保持拟设的对称编码。尽管二进制编码的量子比特效率更高，但其硬件高效拟设更难训练，且在利用守恒量方面效果较差。相比之下，对称编码需要更多量子比特，但能达到显著更高的保真度，收敛更快，且表现出比二进制硬件高效拟设更好的可训练性。这些结果将对称性保持编码确定为在现有量子比特平台上模拟更高自旋模型的实用途径。</p></details> | 2026-07-14 | Chufan Lyu et al. |
| 9 | **[Clifford-Only Quantum Reed-Solomon Codes and a Tornado Concatenation for Biased-Noise Cat Qubits](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.13105v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Dissipative cat qubits exponentially suppress one Pauli error channel with the mean photon number, leaving the conjugate bit-flip error as the dominant failure mode. This strong noise bias makes the full machinery of general quantum error correction unnecessary: a code need only protect against a single error type, and any classical linear code can be promoted to a Clifford stabilizer code that does exactly this. We use this observation to build a Clifford-only quantum Reed-Solomon (RS) code. Starting from the [7,3,5] RS code over $GF(2^{3})$ which is maximum distance separable, we expand each field symbol into three bits to obtain the [21,9,6] linear code over $GF(2)$, realized as a [[21,9, $d_{X}=6$, $d_{Z}=1$]] bit-flip code whose stabilizers are products of Z operators. Because no phase-flip correction is attempted, the construction avoids the non-Clifford quantum Fourier transform required by the Grassl-Beth quantum RS codes and is fully simulable in Stim. Errors are decoded by a lookup table of minimum-weight corrections. We then introduce a Tornado architecture: a two-layer concatenation that wraps every position of the outer RS code in an inner distance-three repetition code, yielding a [[63, 9, 18]] code decoded in two stages, a majority vote within each repetition block followed by the outer lookup table. Monte Carlo simulations show that at a physical bit-flip rate $p=0.1$ the Tornado code reaches a logical error rate $p_{L}\approx5.3\times10^{-3}$, below both parent codes, and that its logical error rate scales as $p_{L}\propto p^{6}$ at low p, in contrast to $p^{2}$ for the repetition code and $p^{3}$ for the standalone RS code. We give the exact construction, the error and circuit model, an asymptotic scaling analysis, and an account of the overhead cost and of the assumptions behind the noise model.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>耗散猫量子比特以平均光子数指数级抑制一个泡利误差通道，使得共轭的比特翻转误差成为主要的失效模式。这种强噪声偏置使得通用量子纠错的完整机制变得不必要：一个码只需保护免受单一误差类型的影响，任何经典线性码都可以提升为恰好做到这一点的克利福德稳定子码。我们利用这一观察结果构建了一个仅含克利福德门的量子里德-所罗门码。从 $GF(2^{3})$ 上最大距离可分的 [7,3,5] RS码出发，我们将每个域符号扩展为三个比特，得到 $GF(2)$ 上的 [21,9,6] 线性码，实现为一个稳定子为Z算符乘积的 [[21,9, $d_{X}=6$, $d_{Z}=1$]] 比特翻转码。由于不尝试相位翻转纠错，该构造避免了Grassl-Beth量子RS码所需的非克利福德量子傅里叶变换，并且可在Stim中完全模拟。误差通过最小权重校正的查找表进行解码。然后我们引入一种Tornado架构：一种两层级联，将外层RS码的每个位置包裹在一个内层距离为三的重复码内，产生一个 [[63, 9, 18]] 码，分两阶段解码——每个重复块内进行多数投票，然后进行外层查找表。蒙特卡洛模拟表明，在物理比特翻转率 $p=0.1$ 时，Tornado码达到逻辑错误率 $p_{L}\approx5.3\times10^{-3}$，低于其两个父码，并且在低p时其逻辑错误率按 $p_{L}\propto p^{6}$ 标度，而重复码为 $p^{2}$，独立RS码为 $p^{3}$。我们给出了精确的构造、误差和电路模型、渐近标度分析，以及关于开销成本和噪声模型背后假设的说明。</p></details> | 2026-07-14 | Cheng-You Ho et al. |
| 10 | **[Fast measurement-based generation of large-scale Greenberger-Horne-Zeilinger state with atomic nuclear-spin qubits](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.12565v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Large-scale Greenberger-Horne-Zeilinger~(GHZ) state is useful for quantum technologies but difficult to be prepared. Here, we propose fast measurement-based preparation of large-scale GHZ states by a four-qubit quantum phase gate with nuclear-spin qubits of alkaline-earth-like atoms, which is named as quantum ferromagnetic gate~(QFG) due to its analogy to the alignment of molecular magnetic moments in a classical magnet. A high-fidelity Rydberg-mediated QFG can be realized in a time of $6π/Ω_{\text{m}}$ with $Ω_{\text{m}}$ the maximal Rydberg Rabi frequency. From a product state of three data atom and one ancilla atom, a gluing circuit with one QFG, two single-qubit gates, and a projective measurement of the ancilla can generate a 3-qubit GHZ state, and repetition of this gluing circuit can lead to 9, 27, 81, 243, $\cdots$-qubit GHZ states. Analyses based on currently available techniques show that a 243-qubit GHZ state is realizable, and more qubits can be entangled with higher detection fidelity.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>大规模格林伯格-霍恩-蔡林格态对量子技术很有用，但难以制备。在此，我们提出通过一个基于碱土金属原子核自旋量子比特的四量子比特量子相位门（因其类似于经典磁体中分子磁矩的排列而被称为量子铁磁门）来快速基于测量地制备大规模GHZ态。一个高保真度的里德伯介导QFG可在时间6π/Ωₘ内实现，其中Ωₘ为最大里德伯拉比频率。从一个由三个数据原子和一个辅助原子组成的乘积态出发，一个包含一个QFG、两个单量子比特门以及辅助原子投影测量的粘合电路可以生成一个3量子比特GHZ态，重复此粘合电路可得到9、27、81、243……量子比特的GHZ态。基于当前可用技术的分析表明，243量子比特的GHZ态是可实现的，并且更多量子比特可以通过更高的探测保真度实现纠缠。</p></details> | 2026-07-14 | Yan Lu et al. |
| 11 | **[Strain-Induced Detuning of a Dressed Nitrogen-Vacancy Qubit: Effective Two-Level Theory and Its Validity](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.12453v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>The nitrogen-vacancy (NV) center in diamond can be operated as a microwave-dressed qubit. In the ideal two-level limit, its transition frequency is first-order insensitive to static magnetic fields, providing robustness against magnetic detuning noise. In practical diamond devices, however, residual transverse crystal strain mixes the $\ket{m_{s}=\pm1}$ spin sublevels and modifies the dressed qubit. In this study, we derive an analytical effective two-level model of a strained dressed NV qubit by perturbatively eliminating the far-detuned spectator state from the full three-level dressed Hamiltonian. We obtain closed-form expressions for the dressed-state splitting, the spin-locking mixing angle, and the longitudinal magnetic-field coupling. We show that transverse strain shifts the dressed-state resonance and tilts the spin-locking axis. These two effects restore a finite DC-field response and thereby quantify the loss of magnetic robustness. We demonstrate these features in simulated pulsed electron spin resonance spectra that incorporate rate-equation-based optical readout. We further derive exact validity criteria from the eigenvalues and spectator weights of the full three-level Hamiltonian. For practical use, we reduce these criteria to two controlled guidelines: the spectator-like branch must remain above the nominal upper dressed state, and its branch-specific admixture must remain small. A validity diagram over the axial-field--transverse-strain plane summarizes these approximate conditions and provides practical guidelines for designing dressed-NV sensing experiments.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>金刚石中的氮-空位中心可作为微波缀饰量子比特运行。在理想的两能级极限下，其跃迁频率对静磁场一阶不敏感，从而提供了对磁失谐噪声的鲁棒性。然而，在实际金刚石器件中，残余横向晶体应变会混合|mₛ=±1⟩自旋子能级并改变缀饰量子比特。在本研究中，我们通过从完整的三能级缀饰哈密顿量中微扰消除远失谐旁观态，推导了一个应变缀饰NV量子比特的解析有效两能级模型。我们获得了缀饰态分裂、自旋锁定混合角和纵向磁场耦合的闭式表达式。我们证明横向应变会移动缀饰态共振并倾斜自旋锁定轴。这两个效应恢复了有限的直流场响应，从而量化了磁鲁棒性的损失。我们在结合了基于速率方程的光学读出的模拟脉冲电子自旋共振谱中展示了这些特征。我们进一步从完整三能级哈密顿量的本征值和旁观态权重推导了精确的有效性判据。为便于实际应用，我们将这些判据简化为两个受控准则：类似旁观态的分支必须保持在标称的上缀饰态之上，且其分支特定的混合必须保持很小。轴向场-横向应变平面上的有效性图总结了这些近似条件，并为设计缀饰NV传感实验提供了实用指南。</p></details> | 2026-07-14 | Jihyeon Jeon et al. |
| 12 | **[Error correction on an array of superconducting qubits with defective components](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.12118v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>A solid-state quantum-computing architecture will require the fabrication of arrays of many coupled qubits. It is inevitable that this process will produce qubits and couplers with varying performance, with some components underperforming due to imperfect fabrication. Quantum error-correction requires high-performing components and hence these defects must be dealt with, either by adapting the code to exclude the defects, or by informing the decoder to accommodate defects in post-processing. Here we implement and compare strategies to operate distance-5 surface codes on a quantum processor consisting of a square-lattice array of 120 superconducting qubits. We demonstrate a dramatic reduction in the probability of a logical error in a memory experiment by excluding underperforming components, compared with both a standard approach of ignoring defects, and a defect-aware decoding approach. We observe up to 2.8X improvement in logical errors per round when excluding defects compared with the standard defect-ignorant approach (1.62% compared to 4.49%). In contrast, defect-aware decoding gives only modest gains. Defects are also expected to be particularly harmful for measurement-based logical operations. Using a stability experiment we show that excluding defects resurrects measurement-based logic gate performance, observing a 6.3% per-round suppression of failure rate when excluding defects, compared to zero suppression otherwise. Furthermore, we show a further substantial decrease in logical errors when using leakage post-selection in combination with our defect exclusion strategies, resulting in a distance-5 code outperforming the best distance-3 in one basis. Our experiments therefore give a proof-of-principle demonstration of the essential utility of defect exclusion methods in the scale-up of solid-state quantum computing approaches.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>固态量子计算架构需要制造由许多耦合量子比特组成的阵列。这一过程不可避免地会产生性能各异的量子比特和耦合器，其中一些组件因制造不完美而表现不佳。量子纠错需要高性能组件，因此必须处理这些缺陷，要么通过调整代码以排除缺陷，要么通过通知解码器在后处理中适应缺陷。在此，我们实施并比较了在由120个超导量子比特组成的方格阵列量子处理器上运行距离5表面码的策略。我们证明，与忽略缺陷的标准方法以及缺陷感知解码方法相比，通过排除表现不佳的组件，记忆实验中逻辑错误的概率显著降低。与标准的缺陷忽略方法相比，排除缺陷时每轮逻辑错误率提高了高达2.8倍（1.62%对比4.49%）。相比之下，缺陷感知解码仅带来适度提升。缺陷预计对基于测量的逻辑操作尤其有害。通过稳定性实验，我们表明排除缺陷可以恢复基于测量的逻辑门性能，观察到排除缺陷时每轮故障率抑制了6.3%，而其他情况下则无抑制。此外，我们展示了将泄漏后选择与我们的缺陷排除策略结合使用时，逻辑错误进一步大幅减少，导致距离5码在一个基上优于最佳的距离3码。因此，我们的实验为缺陷排除方法在固态量子计算方法规模化中的基本效用提供了原理验证性演示。</p></details> | 2026-07-13 | Julien M. Drouet et al. |
| 13 | **[Remote Entanglement of Solid-State Spin Qubits Integrated in Broadband Waveguides](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.12002v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Solid-state spin-photon interfaces promise to scale quantum networks through on-chip photonic integration and multiplexed entanglement generation. To date, remote entanglement between integrated emitters has been realized only in cavity-enhanced systems, where fabrication yield and spectral matching remain major obstacles. Here we demonstrate heralded remote entanglement between diamond tin-vacancy spin qubits embedded in separate on-chip waveguides. Combining intrinsically efficient photon emission with a broadband waveguide architecture provides high device yield and obviates the need for spectral matching to cavity modes. We realize coherent optical and spin control and achieve high-visibility two-photon interference. By combining photon-mediated entanglement generation with real-time feedforward, we produce a consistent entangled state independent of the heralding pattern. These results establish waveguide-integrated tin-vacancy centers as a compelling platform for scalable quantum network nodes.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>固态自旋-光子界面有望通过片上光子集成与复用纠缠生成实现量子网络的规模化扩展。迄今，集成发射器之间的远程纠缠仅在腔增强系统中实现，而制造良率与光谱匹配仍是主要障碍。本文展示了嵌入独立片上波导的金刚石锡空位自旋量子比特之间的预示性远程纠缠。将本征高效光子发射与宽带波导架构相结合，可实现高器件良率，并无需与腔模进行光谱匹配。我们实现了相干光控与自旋操控，并获得高可见度双光子干涉。通过将光子介导的纠缠生成与实时前馈相结合，我们生成了与预示模式无关的稳定纠缠态。这些结果确立了波导集成锡空位中心作为可扩展量子网络节点的重要平台。</p></details> | 2026-07-13 | Christopher Waas et al. |
| 14 | **[Multiparameter Quantum Estimation in a Raman-Coupled Two-Qubit System](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.11823v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>We investigate multiparameter quantum estimation in a Raman-coupled two-qubit system at thermal equilibrium. Analytical expressions for the quantum Fisher information matrix are derived to characterize the simultaneous estimation of the temperature and Raman coupling strength. The corresponding quantum Cramér--Rao bounds are obtained and compared with those of individual estimation strategies. Our results reveal optimal operating regimes determined by the interplay between thermal fluctuations and coherent interactions. In particular, quantum thermometry exhibits a well-defined optimal temperature window, whereas the estimation of the Raman coupling strength is significantly enhanced in the low-temperature and weak-coupling regime. We further show that simultaneous estimation can outperform independent estimation within appropriate parameter regions, highlighting the advantages of multiparameter quantum metrology. These results provide analytical insights into the ultimate precision limits of Raman-coupled two-qubit systems and identify promising operating regimes for quantum sensing and quantum thermometry.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>我们研究了热平衡状态下拉曼耦合两量子比特系统中的多参数量子估计。通过推导量子费舍信息矩阵的解析表达式，表征了温度与拉曼耦合强度的同时估计。获得了相应的量子克拉美-罗下界，并与单独估计策略进行了比较。我们的结果揭示了由热涨落与相干相互作用共同决定的最优工作区间。特别地，量子测温存在明确的最优温度窗口，而拉曼耦合强度的估计在低温和弱耦合区域显著增强。我们进一步证明，在适当参数区域内，同时估计可优于独立估计，凸显了多参数量子计量的优势。这些结果为拉曼耦合两量子比特系统的终极精度极限提供了分析性见解，并确定了量子传感与量子测温中具有前景的工作区间。</p></details> | 2026-07-13 | Omar Bachain et al. |
| 15 | **[Quantum-classical neurons upgraded with optical spin qubits for advanced computing and networking architectures](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.11992v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Hardware neurons incorporating built-in memory components are critical technologies for implementing large scale neural networks that exhibit adaptive-itinerant behavior and produce biological-inspired spiking patterns that match neuroscience known operations (1). Moreover, neurons capable of full quantum information processing through their qubit states and quantum trajectory provides capability for hybrid quantum-classical operations through the level of coherence/entanglement and non-Markovianity (2,3). These attributes further contribute to solving complex quantum mechanical problems by providing a rich and diverse group for expressing quantum neural states. Upgrading these hardware neurons now with optical spin qubits excitable with pulsed laser excitation in the near infrared and designed from negatively charged silicon vacancies in semiconductor silicon carbide (4) and Neodymium rare earth ions in the superconducting Niobium/Niobium oxide film (5) that form the memory provides access to the unique spin Hamiltonian that considers electronic and nuclear interactions. In this manuscript, we experimentally measure opto-electronic quantum-classical neurons integrated with a optical spin qubit and examine how tailored neuronal spiking sequences drive the photoluminescence oscillations and modulate the quantum spin transitions. We derive a quantum model for the system that considers the interaction between the neuron and optical qubit spin and perform calculations to project how quantum computing operations are expandable across the state space in the quantum-classical neuron and spin qubit system. For example, the resulting impact on the neuron quantum states where the strength is adjustable due to dynamical memory changes. These results are critical for realizing hardware neurons with quantum optical capabilities and inspired by the existence in biology of biophotons.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>集成内置记忆组件的硬件神经元是实现大规模神经网络的关键技术，这类网络能展现自适应游走行为，并产生符合神经科学已知操作的生物启发式脉冲模式（1）。此外，能够通过量子比特态与量子轨迹实现完整量子信息处理的神经元，可借助相干性/纠缠度与非马尔可夫性（2,3）提供混合量子-经典运算能力。这些特性通过为表达量子神经态提供丰富多样的群组，进一步助力解决复杂量子力学问题。如今，利用近红外脉冲激光激发、基于半导体碳化硅中带负电硅空位（4）与超导铌/氧化铌薄膜中钕稀土离子（5）设计的光学自旋量子比特升级这些硬件神经元，可访问考虑电子与核相互作用的独特自旋哈密顿量。本文通过实验测量集成光学自旋量子比特的光电量子-经典神经元，研究定制化神经元脉冲序列如何驱动光致发光振荡并调制量子自旋跃迁。我们推导了考虑神经元与光学量子比特自旋相互作用的系统量子模型，并通过计算预测量子计算操作如何在量子-经典神经元与自旋量子比特系统的状态空间中扩展。例如，因动态记忆变化导致强度可调的神经元量子态所受影响。这些结果对实现具有量子光学能力、受生物光子存在启发的硬件神经元至关重要。</p></details> | 2026-07-13 | Osama M. Nayfeh et al. |
| 16 | **[Stability studies on subtractively-fabricated CMOS-compatible superconducting transmon qubits](https://arxiv.org/abs/2512.18037v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Developing fault-tolerant quantum processors with error correction demands large arrays of physical qubits whose key performance metrics (coherence times, control fidelities) must remain within specifications over both short and long timescales. Here we investigated the temporal stability of subtractively fabricated CMOS-compatible superconducting transmon qubits. During a single cooldown and over a period of 95 hours, we monitored several parameters for 8 qubits, including coherence times $T_1$ and $T_2^*$, which exhibit fluctuations originating primarily from the interaction between two-level system (TLS) defects and the host qubit. We also demonstrate that subtractively-fabricated superconducting quantum devices align with the theoretical predictions that higher mean lifetimes $T_1$ correspond to larger fluctuations. To assess long-term stability, we tracked two representative qubits over 10 cooldown cycles spanning more than one year. We observed an average total downward shift in both qubit transition frequencies of approximately 61 MHz within the thermal cycles considered. In contrast, readout resonator frequencies decreased only marginally. Meanwhile, $T_1$ exhibits fluctuations from cycle to cycle, but maintains a stable baseline value.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>开发具有纠错能力的容错量子处理器需要大规模物理量子比特阵列，其关键性能指标（相干时间、控制保真度）必须在短时间与长时间尺度上均保持规格要求。本文研究了采用减法工艺制备的CMOS兼容超导transmon量子比特的时间稳定性。在单次降温过程中，我们在95小时内监测了8个量子比特的多个参数，包括相干时间\(T_1\)和\(T_2^*\)，其涨落主要源于二能级系统缺陷与宿主量子比特的相互作用。我们还证明，减法工艺制备的超导量子器件符合理论预测：更高的平均寿命\(T_1\)对应更大的涨落。为评估长期稳定性，我们追踪了两个代表性量子比特在超过一年、共计10次降温循环中的表现。在考虑的热循环中，观察到两个量子比特跃迁频率的平均总下降量约为61 MHz。相比之下，读取谐振腔频率仅出现微小下降。同时，\(T_1\)在不同循环间存在涨落，但保持稳定的基线值。</p></details> | 2026-07-13 | Chawki Dhieb et al. |
| 17 | **[Multi-Stage Mamba-Based Architecture for Fast and Scalable Superconducting Qubit Readout](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.11668v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Reliable qubit readout is a critical bottleneck toward fault-tolerant quantum computing (FTQC). In superconducting quantum processors, readout operations are both error-prone and high-latency. These challenges become more severe in frequency-multiplexed architectures, where signal crosstalk among neighboring qubits significantly degrades readout fidelity. Existing machine learning (ML)-based approaches rely on feed-forward neural networks (FNNs) that suffer from large parameter sizes and lack an end-to-end network that jointly addresses relaxation errors and discriminates qubit states. In this work, we present a multi-stage qubit state discriminator based on the Mamba model, which enables efficient sequence modeling with linear complexity. The first stage performs initial state discrimination, followed by a refinement stage that identifies and mitigates relaxation-induced errors. Our lightweight model achieves a geometric mean readout fidelity of 0.906, outperforming the best-reported state-of-the-art method while reducing parameter size by 49.6%; our optimal model further reaches 0.911. Both models remain robust across varying input trace lengths, maintaining a high fidelity of 0.893 at readout durations as short as 500 $ns$, achieving up to a 26% reduction in logical error rate over prior work in quantum error correction (QEC).</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>可靠的量子比特读取是实现容错量子计算的关键瓶颈。在超导量子处理器中，读取操作既易出错又具有高延迟。这些挑战在频率复用架构中更为严峻，相邻量子比特间的信号串扰会显著降低读取保真度。现有的基于机器学习的方法依赖前馈神经网络，其参数规模庞大，且缺乏能够联合处理弛豫误差与区分量子比特状态的端到端网络。本文提出一种基于Mamba模型的多阶段量子比特状态判别器，该模型能够以线性复杂度实现高效序列建模。第一阶段执行初始状态判别，随后由精炼阶段识别并缓解弛豫诱导的误差。我们的轻量级模型实现了0.906的几何平均读取保真度，在参数规模减少49.6%的同时超越了现有最佳方法；最优模型进一步达到0.911。两个模型在不同输入迹长下均保持鲁棒性，在读取时长仅为500纳秒时仍维持0.893的高保真度，并在量子纠错中相比先前工作实现了逻辑错误率最高26%的降低。</p></details> | 2026-07-13 | Luca Otting et al. |
| 18 | **[From Circuits to Hardware: Benchmarking Standard and Qubit-Efficient Quantum Optimization on Real Hardware](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.11637v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Despite rapid progress in quantum optimization, broad real-hardware benchmarks comparing multiple algorithmic families across diverse combinatorial problems under a common protocol remain limited. We benchmark gate-based quantum optimization on four NP-hard problems: multi-dimensional knapsack (MDKP), maximum independent set (MIS), quadratic assignment (QAP), and market-share (MSP). We study VQE, CVaR-VQE, standard, multi-angle, and warm-start QAOA, together with qubit-efficient PCE and QRAO, on IBM Heron r1/r2 processors using resilience-level-2 mitigation. To our knowledge, this includes the first real-hardware QRAO results and the first multi-problem PCE hardware benchmark. Across 247 method-instance combinations, we report transpiled circuit size, hardware outcomes, and an independent-error gate-count fidelity proxy, $F_{\mathrm{est}}$. For MDKP and MIS, an empirical operating point near $F_{\mathrm{est}}\approx 0.1$, corresponding to about 770 two-qubit gates at the median Heron-r2 CZ error rate, marks the onset of noise-dominated execution. QAP exposes a separate bottleneck: dense one-hot encodings and an exponentially sparse feasible manifold, with feasible fraction $10!/2^{100}$ at $n=10$; no tested hardware method produces a feasible assignment. Compiled QAOA-family circuits are generally noise dominated, and a matched uniform-random control shows that most feasible low-fidelity outcomes fall within the random range, apart from one finite-sample MIS warm-start exception. A SWAP-aware, fractional-gate, Nighthawk-topology compilation counterfactual reduces two-qubit counts but leaves all circuits below $F_{\mathrm{est}}=10^{-3}$. These conclusions apply to the tested implementations rather than QAOA in general. Qubit-efficient methods extend runnable instance sizes, but only within the empirical fidelity budget.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>尽管量子优化领域进展迅速，但在统一协议下跨多种组合问题对多个算法家族进行广泛真实硬件基准测试的研究仍然有限。我们对四种NP难问题：多维背包问题、最大独立集问题、二次分配问题和市场份额问题，开展了基于门量子优化的基准测试。在IBM Heron r1/r2处理器上，采用弹性级别2的误差缓解方案，我们研究了VQE、CVaR-VQE、标准QAOA、多角度QAOA、热启动QAOA，以及量子比特高效的PCE和QRAO方法。据我们所知，这包含了首次真实硬件QRAO结果以及首次多问题PCE硬件基准测试。针对247个方法-实例组合，我们报告了编译后的电路规模、硬件结果以及独立误差门计数保真度代理指标\(F_{\mathrm{est}}\)。对于MDKP和MIS，经验工作点接近\(F_{\mathrm{est}}\approx 0.1\)（对应Heron r2中位CZ误差率下约770个双量子比特门），标志着噪声主导执行的开始。QAP暴露了另一个瓶颈：密集的独热编码与指数级稀疏的可行解流形，在\(n=10\)时可行解比例为\(10!/2^{100}\)；所有测试的硬件方法均未产生可行分配。编译后的QAOA系列电路普遍受噪声主导，而匹配的均匀随机对照显示，除一个有限样本MIS热启动例外，大多数低保真度可行结果落在随机范围内。考虑SWAP感知、分数门、Nighthawk拓扑的编译反事实方案减少了双量子比特门数量，但所有电路仍低于\(F_{\mathrm{est}}=10^{-3}\)。这些结论适用于所测试的实现方式，而非泛化至QAOA整体。量子比特高效方法扩展了可运行的实例规模，但仅限于经验保真度预算之内。</p></details> | 2026-07-13 | Monit Sharma et al. |
| 19 | **[Robust Spin Qubit Coupler via Minimal Kitaev Chain](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.11554v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>While a minimal Kitaev chain is promised to host unprotected Majorana zero modes, its role for spin qubits is relatively underappreciated. Following recent breakthroughs in the fine control of transport behaviors, we propose to use minimal Kitaev chain as a robust coupling module between spin qubits. Long-distance, anisotropic exchange coupling can be mediated by the Andreev bound states (ABSs) in the hybrid segment. The chemical potential of ABS gives a simple way to selectively control the coupling strength and its response to local perturbations. Moreover, this additional control degree of freedom creates a unique sweet spot, allowing both strong coupling and first-order immunity against charge noise. The protected qubit encoded on the minimal Kitaev chain at the sweet spot is shown to boast over 200 fold improvement in decoherence time.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>尽管最小Kitaev链被认为可承载非受保护的马约拉纳零模，但其对自旋量子比特的作用相对未被充分认识。基于近期在输运行为精细调控方面的突破，我们提出将最小Kitaev链用作自旋量子比特间的鲁棒耦合模块。长程各向异性交换耦合可通过混合段中的安德烈夫束缚态进行中介。安德烈夫束缚态的化学势提供了一种简单方式来选择性控制耦合强度及其对局部扰动的响应。此外，这一额外控制自由度创造了一个独特的最佳工作点，同时实现强耦合与对电荷噪声的一阶免疫。在该最佳工作点上编码于最小Kitaev链中的受保护量子比特，其退相干时间被证明可提升超过200倍。</p></details> | 2026-07-13 | Jiaan Qi et al. |
| 20 | **[On the Experimental Determination of Nonlocal Characteristics of Two-Qubit Gates](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.11973v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>In this paper, we discuss the experimental determination of the nonlocal characteristics of two-qubit gates. Based on the recently derived expressions for the entangling power and gate typicality of two-qubit gates, we construct two-qubit quantum circuits to measure the entangling power and gate typicality of the two-qubit gates, which are generated by the elements of the su(4) Cartan subalgebra. These elements describe the native interactions in many quantum processors. Hence, these circuits can be used to determine the nonlocal characteristics of native gates of many quantum processors. In each circuit, the native gate is applied twice. In addition, each circuit consists of at least one CNOT gate. A set of six two-qubit circuits is constructed to measure the entangling power. The number of circuits is further reduced to three by increasing the nonlocal resources (the number of CNOT gates). To measure the gate typicality, a set of three two-qubit circuits is constructed. Measurement of gate typicality requires more nonlocal resources than the measurement of entangling power.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>本文探讨双量子比特门非局域特性的实验测定方法。基于近期推导的双量子比特门纠缠能力与门典型性表达式，我们构建了双量子比特量子电路，用于测量由su(4)嘉当子代数元素生成的双量子比特门的纠缠能力与门典型性。这些元素描述了许多量子处理器中的原生相互作用。因此，这些电路可用于测定众多量子处理器原生门的非局域特性。在每个电路中，原生门被施加两次。此外，每个电路至少包含一个CNOT门。我们构建了六组双量子比特电路以测量纠缠能力，通过增加非局域资源（CNOT门数量）将电路数量进一步缩减至三组。为测量门典型性，构建了三组双量子比特电路。门典型性的测量需要比纠缠能力测量更多的非局域资源。</p></details> | 2026-07-13 | M. Karthick Selvan et al. |
